content.body:
Replaces array-position scope labeling with role-aware detection:
- ParentScope struct carries Path, Label, HasGit, ChildRepos
- containsGitRepos helper checks immediate children for .git/
- detectParentDirs assigns "org" when children have .git/, "repo"
  when the dir itself has .git/, else "workspace"
- resolveScopeChoice derives label from ParentScope.Label, not index
- discoverUninitializedChildRepos prints child repos lacking .leo/
  when scope is org/user (informational, no auto-init)
- Adds tests for all new helpers in scope_detect_test.go

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(scope): add semantic scope detection with git-repo role assignment
